jsonLdTemplateRules: Use the page canonical URL as @id base.
Connect Person sameAs to Moonn, Timepad, MIIIIPS, Yandex Services, MSU Istina and PsyJournals.
Do not add fake ratings or reviews until the reviews compliance gate is complete.
Do not use MedicalBusiness or medical treatment claims unless separately legally reviewed.
For lecture pages, represent known public lecture cards as ItemList/Event only after card data is verified.
